creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #18)

We also need at least depth=5 for logs) in cleanup, more details in comment #15, otherwise logs would never be cleaned even with $CLENJAIL fix.

And regarding branches... Just did that against latest release as I use latest release. Cleaning jail fix doesn't justify possible use of -devel for me. :-) For the same reason, I would still say local patch to ports tree makes sense until fix will ship in next release which will land ports.
